---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Default Instructions

Read and follow the rules in `.ai/rules/process.md` and `.ai/rules/standards.md`.

Key points:
- Ask clarifying questions before implementation
- Get explicit permission before writing code
- Follow TDD: test first, then implement
- Keep it simple (KISS)
- Don't repeat yourself (DRY) - but only extract when used 3+ times
